title: Toggle Skin Layers
description: Ability to toggle skin layers with keybinds!
body:
# Toggle Skin Layers - ![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/toggle-skin-layers)
Simply grants the ability to bind a keybind to toggle **any** part of the skin layer.

This is useful for those who want to use the skin layers but don't want to have to go into the menu every time they want to change it.

Basic Keybind Screen, you can bind all of these to the same key and toggle it all at once if you would wish.
![Keybind Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mh5ZbG7W/images/fc5fc7ca8d135e43658ddefa50429b713ad29998.png)
